svg.title: Dimina build, runtime, and platform architecture
svg.desc: Mini program source is compiled by DMCC into runtime bundles. A container loads a service runtime and page render runtimes, routes publish and invoke messages, manages navigation and native APIs, and is implemented on Android, iOS, Harmony, and Web.
svg.text: one service runtime · page-scoped render instances
same bundle format + publish / invoke contract

g.text: Web Worker service · iframe pageFrame render
mitt · optional Express / Axios CORS proxy

svg.text: Solid arrows: load, route, or call · Dashed arrows: dependency, extension, or update path
